summary: Plan-only classification for cluster gitcrawl-353-plan-wave-20260615-a. #44460 remains the open canonical issue for the cron doctor legacy notify loop. #89396 is the narrow open contributor PR that covers the canonical issue, but merge/fixed-by closeout is not planned because merge is blocked by job frontmatter, maintainer review is still requested, and one check is failing. Security-sensitive linked PR #48742 is quarantined read-only and does not affect the non-security canonical path.

actions.reason: Best surviving issue for the root cause; keep open until a validated fix lands.

#89396 is the current non-security implementation path for #44460, but it is not merge-ready under this plan job because merge is blocked and a failing check plus maintainer-review requirement remain.
Security-sensitive linked PR is quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling without poisoning the ordinary #44460/#89396 cron-doctor path.
